label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 5

extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won pan-flat sprint to Albacete after major crash at 22km decimated lead-out trains, outsprinting JAKOBSEN Fabio who had no teammates left.
tactical_patterns: Decuninck-QuickStep maintained front positioning through pre-crash nervous phase while FDJ/DSM lost positioning recovering from crash, compromising sprint trains.
Teams drove tempo hard from 22km despite no wind materializing, suggesting fear of crosswinds triggers dangerous positioning battles regardless of conditions.
Jakobsen isolated after crash still managed second, revealing pure speed advantage over DeMarc who had full train but finished outside top-10.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: Alpecin avoided crash chaos and delivered clean leadout when rival trains neutralized, capitalizing on organizational advantage not pure speed
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: Second place without leadout support after crash suggests he's faster than stage positioning indicates when circumstances align
rider_signals.DEMARE Arnaud: negative: 10th place despite being pre-stage favorite and having teammates, crash recovery effort appeared to drain finishing punch
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Lost 12 minutes suggesting serious crash injuries, not merely mechanical, making GC ambitions likely abandoned
rider_signals.TARAMAE Rui: negative: Crashed second consecutive day while in leader's jersey, pattern suggests positioning vulnerability in nervous flat stages
